query:
-- فحص تفاصيل الدفعة
SELECT * FROM payroll_batches WHERE code = 'Batch-2026-02-001';

-- فحص عناصر الدفعة مع أسماء العمال
SELECT 
  pbi.id,
  pbi.worker_id,
  w.full_name AS worker_name,
  w.code AS worker_code,
  pbi.minutes_worked,
  pbi.rate_per_minute,
  pbi.base_amount,
  pbi.total_amount,
  g.name AS group_name,
  g.rate_per_minute AS group_rate
FROM payroll_batch_items pbi
JOIN payroll_batches pb ON pbi.batch_id = pb.id
JOIN workers w ON pbi.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id
WHERE pb.code = 'Batch-2026-02-001'
ORDER BY pbi.id;
